scope: Windows 11 validation for Studio, Pulse, Console, Relay configuration, Suite launchers, signing, and installer artifacts.

notes: Mac-side checks prove code and script readiness only.
Windows capture devices, encoders, installers, launchers, signing, and live service credentials must be validated on Windows hardware.

prerequisiteCommands.evidence: Prerequisite report shows required Windows tools and runtimes are available.
dist\windows-suite contains Studio, Pulse, Console, launchers, and manifest artifacts.
Suite launchers start installed apps and discovery heartbeats appear under %APPDATA%\vaexcore\suite.
Installed apps and release artifacts report expected signing status.

checks: Validate screen, window, camera, and microphone capture devices.
Validate recording path permissions and encoder readiness.
Confirm scene output-ready diagnostic before starting encoders.
Consume a Studio recording handoff with outputReady metadata.
Confirm review queue state, latest recording display, and media playback.
Open Console setup workflow on Windows.
Validate local pairing, support bundle export, and bot completion states.
Complete live Twitch and Discord credential validation outside code automation.
Confirm Cloudflare Worker deployment and D1 migrations separately from this repo.
Run protected Relay diagnostics with real admin credentials.
Validate Twitch app-token send, retry queue, and Discord interaction registration in live services.
Archive JSON and Markdown reports with Windows validation evidence.

manualBlockers: Windows hardware capture and encoder validation
Twitch OAuth, EventSub, chat send, and stream key validation
Discord Interactions Endpoint, slash command, suggestion, and announcement validation
